data.sentence: Let's go around the room with status updates.
Worked on the queue migration last week, no blockers.
Pushed two PRs, both reviewed and merged.
Roadmap planning continues, no changes to the priority list.
Ramped on the new service, expect first PR by end of week.
Pair-programmed with Eng A on the queue work.
Anything else worth flagging?
Nothing from me.
All quiet.
Great, let's wrap up.
